description: Run a fast baseline assessment before git commit and block only if the engine or graph honesty gate fails. Advisory for findings; never edits code.

hooks.command: node "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/packages/core/runtime/assess-run.mjs" --repo "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}" --out "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}/.assessment" >/dev/null 2>&1 || { echo 'assess pre-commit failed: graph invalid or engine failed' >&2; exit 2; }
